# CloverSec CTF For Example 0.3.5

Install as a Codex marketplace from GitHub:

```bash
codex plugin marketplace add D1a0y1bb/CloverSec-CTF-ForExample --ref v0.3.5
codex plugin add cloversec-ctf-forexample@cloversec-ctf
```

## Highlights

- Added a Dockerizer confirmation gate for container/source challenges.
- Upstream Dockerfile and compose files are now treated as migration input only.
- Unconfirmed container/source cases are marked `Dockerizer 改造待确认`.
- Batch reports block archive readiness until Dockerizer conversion is confirmed.
- `failure_cases.jsonl` records `platform_conversion_required`.
- `confirmation_request` now supports the `dockerizer` action.
- Added `scripts/bump_version.py` to update release version strings consistently.

## Validation

- 117 unit tests passed.
- Official plugin validation passed.
- Release validation passed.
- All 8 MCP servers report version `0.3.5`.
- LLM validation passed on `gpt-5.5`; `gpt-5.4-mini` was used only as a schema stress check.
